sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value String);
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id UInt32, ref_value Float64);
INSERT INTO another_table VALUES (1, toFloat64('2.71')), (2, toFloat64('Inf')), (3, toFloat64('0'));
SELECT id, value, toFloat64(value) AS float_value FROM test_table WHERE toFloat64(value) IN (SELECT ref_value FROM another_table WHERE ref_id > 1);
SELECT id, value, CASE WHEN toFloat64(value) IN (toFloat64('NaN'), toFloat64('0')) THEN 'zero or NaN' END AS categorization FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, ref_value, toFloat64(ref_value) IN (SELECT toFloat64('NaN'), toFloat64('100'), toFloat64('3.14')) AS comparison FROM another_table WHERE toFloat64(ref_value) < 5.0;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE toFloat64(value) IN ('42.7', 'invalid', '3.14') GROUP BY toFloat64(value) HAVING toFloat64(value) IS NOT NULL) AS nested_query;

SELECT a.id, a.value, toFloat64(a.value) AS converted_value FROM test_table AS a JOIN another_table AS b ON a.id = b.ref_id AND toFloat64(a.value) IN (SELECT ref_value FROM another_table WHERE ref_value > 0) GROUP BY a.id, a.value HAVING converted_value BETWEEN 0.1 AND 1000.0;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table AS SELECT toFloat64(value) AS temp_value FROM test_table;
SELECT AVG(temp_value) FROM temp_table WHERE temp_value IS NOT NULL;
